title: January 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 26''' is the 26th day of the year. There are 339 days remaining (340 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1936|1936]] – [[Sal Buscema]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Yoon Ha Lee]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 84|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 84]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Mercedes Varnado]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Pat Welsh]] dies.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 14|''Star Wars'' (1998) 14]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Len Carlson]] dies.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Crosscurrent]]'' published.
*2010 – [[The Dark Times (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Star Wars Miniatures: The Dark Times'']] released.
*[[2011]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 1|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 1]] published.
*2011 – [[Legacy — War 2|''Legacy — War'' 2]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Ian Abercrombie]] dies.
*[[2013]] – "[[Shades of Reason]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[Lords of the Sith]]'' paperback published.
*[[2020]] – "[[The Escape (episode)|The Escape]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 1 — Fortune and Fate]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales (trade paperback)|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales'' trade paperback]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Beware Vader's Castle]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: The Great Jedi Rescue]]'' eBook published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Knitting the Galaxy]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[The High Republic: Trail of Shadows 4|''The High Republic: Trail of Shadows'' 4]] published.
*2022 – "[[Chapter 5: Return of the Mandalorian]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2022 – [[Ken Wannberg|Kenneth Wannberg]] dies.
*[[2023]] - [[Nicholas Kepros]] dies.
<noinclude>
